system_recommendation.executive_summary: Prolonged Hormuz closure is now structurally reshaping global crude flows. Brent holding above $85. Import-dependent economies face sustained elevated costs; immediate actions include LNG diversification, coal stock build, and diplomatic de-escalation push via Oman and Iraq channels.

actual_outcome.documented_response: India secured additional LNG cargoes from Qatar under existing term contracts. Coal India directed to maximise domestic output. MEA confirmed back-channel talks via Oman. PPAC reported 35-day crude stocks, above minimum threshold.
